caption:
Stop searching for the latest secret tactic, hack, or “proprietary system”. Successful Facebook & Instagram ads are the result of a deep understanding of your customers, great copywriting & creatives, a good strategy and of course a great product. Invest time in these areas and ignore the temptation to focus on quick wins and searching for some special “secret”, and you’re much more likely to succeed.

#facebookads #marketing #instagramads #digitalmarketing #digitalmarketingtips #fbads

caption:
Excited to share that I'll be speaking at CopyCon2022 this October!

CopyCon is the perfect event for content creators, marketing managers, in-house copywriters, and freelance copywriters. 

My session is all about teaching you how to write high-converting copy for your Facebook and Instagram ads that delights your audience and brings in low-cost leads and sales.

I'll show you how to walk the fine-line between writing for your target audience and writing for the algorithms to deliver incredible results for your business.

No matter if you’re new, or have some miles on the keyboard, there’s something for everyone at CopyCon.

Want to join me?

It's happening on Saturday 15th October 2022

WHERE: North Sydney, Australia

So what are you waiting for? 

Psst, if you’re not in Australia there are virtual tickets too.

Head to the link in bio to buy your tickets now!

#copycon2022 #BUILDYOURBIZ
alt: Photo by Andrew Hubbard on August 30, 2022.

caption:
Our secret weapon for increasing return on ad spend in 2019...⠀
⠀
Looking back over our numbers for the first half of this year, it's pretty clear to see what's worked best for us and our clients to increase revenue this year.⠀
⠀
By far and away it's Messenger Bots 🔥.⠀
⠀
Here are 3 of my favourite ways to integrate Messenger Bots into a funnel right now:⠀
⠀
1️⃣ Using a bot for webinar reminders. We're adding bot signup buttons to all of our webinar thank-you pages. Offer a webinar worksheet or bonus in exchange for them signing up for your bot. Now you can send a Messenger broadcast just before your webinar starts and watch your live attendance rates jump!⠀
⠀
2️⃣ Acquiring leads. We're using bots to do lead generation from start to finish. Running ads to a bot that collects the email address, passes that to our email system, and then follows up with it's own custom sequence.⠀
⠀
3️⃣ Starting sales conversations. Still one of the most cost-effective ad types to run. All you need to do is retarget sales page visitors with a Messenger Destination ad on Facebook that allows them to start a conversation with your page via Messenger. This allows them to ask questions and have a conversation with you before purchasing. Very cheap to run but they close plenty of sales you'd miss out on otherwise.⠀
